tasks.title: Investigate chat button click handler in popup component
tasks.description: Review the React component or relevant UI code where the chat button is implemented to understand the current click handler logic that opens the popup. Identify why the popup opens only on the first click and not on subsequent clicks.
acceptanceCriteria: Locate the chat button component and its click handler
Understand the state or logic controlling popup visibility
Identify any state or event handling issues causing popup not to open on second click
tasks.expectedResult: Clear understanding of the current popup open/close logic and identification of the cause for the popup not opening on second click

metadata.inputContext: Needs access to popup UI component source code and chat button click handler logic
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for fixing popup toggle behavior

tasks.title: Modify chat button click handler to toggle popup visibility correctly
tasks.description: Update the chat button click handler logic to properly toggle the popup open state on every click. Ensure that the popup opens on the first click and also opens again if closed and clicked again. Use React state or equivalent UI state management to track popup visibility and toggle it accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup closes when clicking outside or close button
Popup opens again on subsequent clicks after closing
tasks.expectedResult: Chat popup toggles open and closed correctly on button clicks

outputPlan.description: Update click handler to toggle popup visibility state properly

metadata.inputContext: Requires understanding of current popup state management from previous task
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Fixes the core issue of popup not opening on second click

tasks.title: Add unit test for chat button popup toggle behavior
tasks.description: Create or update unit tests for the chat button component to verify that clicking the button toggles the popup open and closed correctly. Test that the popup opens on first click, closes on second click, and reopens on subsequent clicks.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test covers popup toggle on button clicks
tasks.expectedResult: Unit tests verify correct popup toggle behavior on chat button clicks

outputPlan.description: Add tests for popup toggle on chat button clicks

metadata.inputContext: Needs updated chat button component with fixed toggle logic
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures popup toggle behavior is tested and prevents regressions

tasks.title: Perform manual UI testing of chat button popup toggle
tasks.description: Manually test the chat button in the extension popup UI to confirm that the popup opens on first click, closes properly, and reopens on subsequent clicks. Verify no unexpected behavior or errors occur during toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup opens and closes correctly on multiple clicks
No console errors or UI glitches observed
tasks.expectedResult: Manual confirmation that chat popup toggle works as expected in UI

metadata.inputContext: Requires updated chat button component and passing tests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides final verification of fix in real UI environment
